name: APPIAN CORP
business: Appian provides process automation technology to large enterprises and governments, combining process orchestration, AI, data fabric, and security features to design, automate, and optimize critical processes.

exposures.sentence: We offer them a range of AI capabilities, ranging from AI-enhanced document processing to autonomous agents capable of acting in dynamic environments.
Appian delivers best-in-class security, auditability, and enterprise guardrails to support even the most mission critical workloads and most sensitive and confidential data.

catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, our Board of Directors authorized a program to repurchase up to $50.0 million of our common stock from February 2026 through February 2028.

tamClaims.claim: According to IDC, the worldwide Business Automation Platform market was $27.8 billion in 2024 and is expected to grow to approximately $70.2 billion in 2029.
tamClaims.sentence: According to IDC, the worldwide Business Automation Platform market was $27.8 billion in 2024 and is expected to grow to approximately $70.2 billion in 2029.
